Gerarda Westerhuis. Sector economist Retail and Leisure
Fast food obviously loses advantage. A striking shift is taking place in food service. Fast service companies – the fast food and delivery chains – grew rapidly during and after corona, but that growth is stalling. Fast food prices increased by almost 40% between January 2020 and June 2025, compared to 28% in restaurants and 34% in supermarkets. “Even fast food is no longer necessarily cheap,” says Westerhuis.
